title: Schwanthalerhöhe

infobox.key: [Authority control databases](/wiki/Help:Authority_control "Help:Authority control") [Edit this at Wikidata](https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q166011#identifiers "Edit this at Wikidata")

infobox.value: This [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich") location article is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Schwanthalerh%C3%B6he&action=edit).

(German pronunciation: [[ˈʃvantaːlɐˌhøːə]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German") [ⓘ](/wiki/File:LL-Q188_(deu)-Ionenlaser-Schwanthalerh%C3%B6he.wav "File:LL-Q188 (deu)-Ionenlaser-Schwanthalerhöhe.wav"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Schwanthalahäh*), also called **Westend**, is a borough of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"). It is located west of the city center and with a population of about 30,000 on just two square kilometers is one of Munich's most densely populated boroughs.[[1]](#cite_note-population-1)
["Population status August 2016"](https://www.muenchen.de/rathaus/dam/jcr:2eb78e65-84a9-4ef7-b382-80faa8e40207/bev_stand_08.pdf) (PDF) (in German). Statistisches Amt München. Retrieved 2016-09-23.

Borough of Munich, Germany

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/76/M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_08_%28Karte%29_-_Schwanthalerh%C3%B6he.png/250px-M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_08_%28Karte%29_-_Schwanthalerh%C3%B6he.png)](/wiki/File:M%C3%BCnchen_-_Stadtbezirk_08_(Karte)_-_Schwanthalerh%C3%B6he.png)

District map

**Schwanthalerhöhe** (German pronunciation: [[ˈʃvantaːlɐˌhøːə]](/wiki/Help:IPA/Standard_German "Help:IPA/Standard German") [ⓘ](/wiki/File:LL-Q188_(deu)-Ionenlaser-Schwanthalerh%C3%B6he.wav "File:LL-Q188 (deu)-Ionenlaser-Schwanthalerhöhe.wav"); [Central Bavarian](/wiki/Central_Bavarian "Central Bavarian"): *Schwanthalahäh*), also called **Westend**, is a borough of [Munich](/wiki/Munich "Munich"). It is located west of the city center and with a population of about 30,000 on just two square kilometers is one of Munich's most densely populated boroughs.[[1]](#cite_note-population-1)

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/bf/M%C3%BCnchen_-_Westend.JPG/250px-M%C3%BCnchen_-_Westend.JPG)](/wiki/File:M%C3%BCnchen_-_Westend.JPG)
